page_summary: A page of mathematical equations showing prime factorizations of large numbers, alongside a large black silhouette of a tall human-like figure on the right side.

symbols.description: Multiplication symbol 'x' used between prime factors throughout all equations
symbols.position: throughout all text blocks on the left side

symbols.description: Superscript exponent digits such as ², ³, ⁵ attached to numbers like 2², 2³, 7², 2⁵
symbols.position: scattered throughout all text blocks on the left side

decorations.description: A tall, narrow, black silhouette of a stylized humanoid figure standing upright, occupying the full right side of the page. The figure has a small rounded head, narrow shoulders, elongated torso, slim arms held against the body, and long thin legs ending in feet. The shape is irregular and slightly distorted, resembling a primitive, totemic, or woodcut-style human form.
decorations.position: right side of the page, spanning from near the top to the bottom
components: small rounded head at the top

uncertain_or_unreadable: The exact artistic intent of the black figure is unclear — it may be a hand-drawn, brush-ink, or printed abstract human form.
A few of the very long prime factors may contain small reading errors due to the dense typography.
